commands.review_summary:
The PR adds read-through loading of default-agent generated plugin model catalogs for secondary-agent model discovery, threads the inherited agent dir through cached discovery, fingerprints inherited catalogs, and adds ModelRegistry tests.

PR surface: Source +72, Tests +79. Total +151 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current-main source shows plugin catalog rows are only loaded from the active agent dir, and the PR supplies live before/after terminal proof for a secondary Google/Gemini agent with a model-less local catalog.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow ModelRegistry code/test repair that automation can attempt without choosing new product semantics.
